message:
test(spatial_hit_index): add 41 edge-case tests for SpatialHitIndex (bd-9bvp0)

Cover config/entry/stats traits, construction edge cases (cell_size=0/1,
zero dims), zero-size rect registration, boundary hit testing, cache
behavior, invalidation, rebuild tracking, z-order tie-breaking,
HitRegion variants, single-cell screen, readonly/mutable equivalence,
full lifecycle, and saturating coordinate boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
